description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a light tan gable roof and white exterior walls, surrounded by a neatly landscaped yard. The front features a small porch with steps leading up to the main entry, flanked by shrubs and a white picket fence. The driveway runs along one side of the house, leading to a detached garage at the rear. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor seating, a swimming pool, and is bordered by trees and hedges for privacy. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light. The property is enclosed by a low fence and features a mix of paved and grassy surfaces.
description: A single-story suburban house with a tan gable roof, white walls, landscaped yard, driveway, and backyard pool. Features include a front porch, detached garage, and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, white picket fence, and driveway entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and the length of the house with visible windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, swimming pool, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, pool, and side yard with trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small windows distributed across all sides
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a small covered porch with steps, a single front door, and minimal decorative elements.
